item.name: Amaro Horn
item.description: A large, curved horn that, when blown, will call your dutiful amaro to your side.

mount.name: Amaro
mount.action: Summon forth your amaro, Norvrandt's favorite beast of burden.
mount.description: Of all the mounts seen in Norvrandt, naught is more ubiquitous than the amaro. Originally created by the mages of ancient Ronka, who selectively bred the flightless cama, present-day beasts carry the seed of their ancestors, which may manifest in the form of superior intellect.
mount.tooltip:
That ever-so-endearing “gwee!”
It's enough to melt a man's heart,
I tell you.
- Lamlyn
